target: unify the machine: strip all external naming (MoAI/MoAI-ADK/Spool/etc), fold the parallel orchestrator layer into the canonical machine defined by agents/default.md + README, make skills granular+integrated, and make the machine self-installing + self-running

canonical.law: Machine law (agents/default.md), NOT the MoAI Constitution
canonical.rule: default.md is canonical. The moai/ layer is external framework branding: de-brand + absorb what is genuinely useful, delete redundant cruft (TRUST-5/MX-tags/SPEC-EARS/Korean/<moai> markers/CLAUDE.md-§N refs that do not exist). Create as few, as small files as possible.

files.desc: flatten output-styles/moai/* -> output-styles/*, de-brand moai.md->machine.md (name: machine) + einstein.md (.moai->.proj, drop <moai> markers)

DONE+VERIFIED: agents/moai/* flattened to agents/* (23 agents, all keep name: so dispatch resolves); 0 moai tokens; .moai/->.proj/ paths migrated; stripped KO/JA/ZH keyword blocks (EN kept) + dead @MX sections (no consumer). settings+hooks still parse.

DONE+VERIFIED: kept+de-branded rules/languages/* (16; dead moai-skill xrefs stripped) + rules/coding-standards.md (thin-command pattern rewritten to Skill-tool routing, Go-build/SPEC refs removed); pruned dead MoAI-ADK framework docs (core/workflow/development/design, ~0 referrers). rules/ moai=0; settings+hooks still valid.

DONE+VERIFIED: 9 moai-* skill dirs renamed (prefix stripped) with matching name: frontmatter; content de-branded (moai/MoAI/the machine/<moai> markers; moai:evolvable->machine:evolvable; `moai review|quality-gate` CLI -> /code-review,/gate; .moai/->.proj/). No agent `skills:` ref needed updating (already clean from slice 3). skills/ moai=0.

IN PROGRESS: machine restructured into .claude/ (commit 5b05591) so the repo is a drop-in payload. default.md skill section rewritten into a grouped unified-toolset catalog (commit 76fc553). output-styles/machine.md reconciled to canon (commit 2e4ed86, v5.2.0): all phantom CLAUDE.md/CLAUDE.local.md §N refs -> default.md+/.proj/* sources; Go-only gate criteria -> /gate (stack-detecting) + language-agnostic backend delegation; memory refs -> kern; false-precision velocity stat removed. TRUST-5 DECISION MADE: it is not standalone jargon -- it was the surface of leftover MoAI-ADK framework docs describing a fictional machine (nonexistent agents api-designer/backend-expert/core-quality, nonexistent commands the-machine:1/2/3-sync, SPEC-First/.proj/specs workflow not wired up, fabricated metrics). foundation-core de-fictionalized: SKILL.md rewritten to 110 truthful lines (commit 86299dd, 18 agents load it) + 19 orphaned modules/references pruned (commit 56a74df); foundation-core TRUST-5=0, hooks parse, dispatch resolves. foundation-quality de-fictionalized too: SKILL.md (6 agents load it) rewritten 250->95 truthful lines preserving the real value (5-dim gate, shift-left/Chesterton habits, rationalizations/red-flags/verification checklists wired to /gate,/code-review,ref-owasp-checklist,ref-testing-pyramid,expert-security) + 6 orphaned files pruned (commit e7b21de). workflow-testing de-fictionalized: SKILL.md (7 agents) rewritten 334->71 terse directive-only lines (characterization+specification testing, rationalizations, red-flags, verification; method routed to superpowers TDD/debugging + ref-testing-pyramid + /gate); entire orphaned modules/reference/references tree pruned (43 files, commit e2ba4d4). ALL THREE fictional framework trees now single truthful files; 68 dead files removed total. NEW DIRECTIVE (2026-06-12 loop 06f5d1dc): remove prose + why-explanations (terse), and meta-optimize the machine for editing speed + memory (kern), learning from Claude Code docs. REMAINING: glossary sweep; terseness sweep of remaining verbose instruction files; verify kern memory wiring.

DONE (differently than originally planned): no install script. README IS the install runtime — an Agent Install Protocol that derives the clone URL from the README's own URL, clones, installs as <target>/.claude/ (excludes .git/README/.claude/.kern/*.lock), runs /bootstrap. Copy step dry-run verified into a throwaway target; human fallback kept.

EXTERNAL NAMING ELIMINATED: moai=0, spool=0, Yoda/R2-D2=0 across all tracked machine files (excl this plan). settings.json parses; both hooks pass node --check; renamed skills' name: frontmatter matches dirs. REMAINING (not external product naming, quality follow-ups): TRUST-5 methodology jargon in ~52 files; output-styles/machine.md still references a nonexistent CLAUDE.md §N and Go-specific gate criteria (needs slice-6 reconciliation to default.md).

coupling.agents_skills_refs: agent frontmatter `skills:` names skill dirs (moai-foundation-core, moai-workflow-testing...). Renaming skill dirs (slice 5) MUST update these refs in the same pass or dispatch loads a missing skill.
coupling.agent_resolution: Claude Code resolves agents by `name:` frontmatter, not path — flattening agents/moai/ -> agents/ was safe for dispatch (all 23 names preserved).
